plan_type_rationale: Single command execution on a feature branch. No logic changes, no phases, no hard stops.

tasks.description: Create branch feature/source-headers-dogfood from current main HEAD: git checkout -b feature/source-headers-dogfood
tasks.success_criteria: Branch created. git branch shows feature/source-headers-dogfood as current.

tasks.description: Run populate-coderef with --source-headers flag from coderef-core root: npx populate-coderef . --source-headers. Capture exit code and stderr.
tasks.success_criteria: Exit code 0. If non-zero, halt and report stderr verbatim — do not commit.

tasks.description: Run git diff to see which source files were modified. Review header format for correctness: headers should follow CodeRef-Semantics format (@coderef-semantics markers). Check that test files are NOT modified. Check that no existing meaningful docblocks were overwritten.
tasks.success_criteria: Diff reviewed. Headers look semantically correct. No test file modifications. No garbled output.

tasks.description: If 1.3 review passes: git add all modified src files and commit. Message: 'dogfood(source-headers): stamp CodeRef-Semantics headers on coderef-core source files via --source-headers'. If review fails: do NOT commit — report issues to ORCHESTRATOR.
tasks.success_criteria: Commit created on feature/source-headers-dogfood (if review passed). Branch left unmerged.

tasks.description: Push feature/source-headers-dogfood to origin for remote review: git push -u origin feature/source-headers-dogfood
